summary: Frontend-only Playwright UI testing of Shatakshi Tiwari portfolio (static SPA, no backend). All 60 critical UI/content/navigation/mobile checks passed at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: LinkedIn URL is placeholder 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/your-handle' and GitHub URL is placeholder 'https://github.com/your-handle' as expected by spec — main agent must replace with real handles before final deploy.
Resume button points to /resume.pdf — placeholder. Drop a real resume.pdf into /app/frontend/public/ before deployment.
Phone in portfolio.js is still placeholder '+91 — XXXXX XXXXX' (not currently rendered anywhere visible, but if exposed later, replace).

action_items: Replace placeholder LinkedIn and GitHub URLs in /app/frontend/src/data/portfolio.js (currently 'your-handle').
Add an actual resume.pdf at /app/frontend/public/resume.pdf so the Download Resume button serves a real file.
Optionally replace placeholder phone value once provided.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, componentized, all interactive elements have data-testid. No critical issues found.
Navbar uses anchor href='#about' style anchors — relying on browser-default smooth scroll via CSS (works fine in tests).
Contact mailto encodes subject and body correctly with encodeURIComponent — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React SPA portfolio. Verified at https://shatakshi-portfolio-1.preview.emergentagent.com. All data-testids documented in review_request are present. Hero, About (bio + mailto email), Skills (11 items including 'Customer Relationship Management'), Experience (Star Estate Dec 2025–May 2026, Short Web Solution Apr 2024–May 2025, each with 5 bullets), Projects (Personal Portfolio Website + Business Analysis & Operational Improvement), Education (MBA + BA), Contact (exact mailto href starting with 'mailto:tshatakshi641@gmail.com?subject=...&body=...'), Download Resume button, LinkedIn/GitHub placeholder links all verified. Mobile (375x844): hamburger appears, desktop nav hides, mobile panel opens on click with all 6 section links. Smooth scroll anchors all land within ~0px of section top.
